riskRows.detail: Current root and main still have unrelated histories, so C03 remains blocked.
Any replay path could widen scope unless the exact commit allowlist and rollback are declared first.
Default branch truth cannot be switched locally without canon-level cutover.

rollbackRows.action: Maintain STOP state and do not open any root-to-main PR contour.
